title: The Error (Horror)
description: There is an error in your world…
body:
** There is an error in your world…**
---
![The pic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cb39de100ce0875703ac9c60787ccc5b5ffcd92.png)
---
This mod turns your Minecraft experience into something… *unpredictable*.
Not everything you see can be trusted anymore.

---



###  **The “Error”**

it could stay or despawn
If it stays, it will follow you, disturb you and try to kill you...

---

###  **Corrupted Chat**

Random messages begin appearing in chat.
They don’t come from you or from any player....

---

### The Dimension 
A corrupted world buit for a hard survival experience.
Filled with Mobs, that want to kill you.
But you can survive with the help of your surroundings.

---
**Do you keep playing… or do you log off?**
